columns.extraction_plan: From Table 1, extract the number and percentage of patients with ECOG performance status 0 in the SOC plus abiraterone groups (with or without radiotherapy). The value is 412 (71%). Also, extract the number and percentage of patients with ECOG performance status 0 in the ADT with docetaxel population, SOC plus abiraterone groups (with or without radiotherapy). The value is 250 (70%).

From Table 1, extract the number and percentage of patients with ECOG performance status 0 in the SOC without abiraterone groups (with or without radiotherapy). The value is 412 (70%). Also, extract the number and percentage of patients with ECOG performance status 0 in the ADT with docetaxel population, SOC without abiraterone groups (with or without radiotherapy). The value is 246 (69%).

From Table 1, extract the number and percentage of patients with ECOG performance status 1-2 in the SOC plus abiraterone groups (with or without radiotherapy). The value is 171 (29%). Also, extract the number and percentage of patients with ECOG performance status 1-2 in the ADT with docetaxel population, SOC plus abiraterone groups (with or without radiotherapy). The value is 105 (30%).

From Table 1, extract the number and percentage of patients with ECOG performance status 1-2 in the SOC without abiraterone groups (with or without radiotherapy). The value is 177 (30%). Also, extract the number and percentage of patients with ECOG performance status 1-2 in the ADT with docetaxel population, SOC without abiraterone groups (with or without radiotherapy). The value is 109 (31%).
